description_long: This is a medium-sized, cylindrical brown handbag with a long, single strap designed for crossbody or shoulder wear. The bag's body appears to be made of supple leather, featuring a rolled, tube-like main compartment with a flap closure that folds over the top. The strap is attached at both ends of the cylinder, running the full length of the bag, and is relatively thin compared to the body. The surface of the bag is plain, with no visible patterns or branding, but it does have some subtle creases and natural leather texture. There are no visible decorative elements or hardware, giving the bag a minimalist and utilitarian appearance. The overall construction suggests it is lightweight and flexible, suitable for carrying small personal items in an urban environment.
description: A cylindrical brown leather handbag with a long, plain strap and a flap closure, featuring a minimalist and unadorned design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the cylindrical body and the long strap extending upward, with the flap closure visible at the end.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the full length of the strap and the rolled, tube-like shape of the bag's main compartment.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, again showing the cylindrical form and the strap, with the flap closure partially visible.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the back of the cylindrical body and the attachment points of the strap, with no visible closure or decorative elements.
attribute_strap_type: Single long strap, crossbody or shoulder length, non-adjustable, attached at both ends of the cylinder.
attribute_closure_mechanism: Flap closure, located at the top of the cylindrical body, folding over the main compartment.

license_info.creator_display_name: The Center for Digital Humanities UArizona
